headline: First Solar (FSLR) Is Up 5.1% After Announcing New 3.7GW U.S. Finishing Plant Expansion
summary: In recent weeks, First Solar announced plans for a new 3.7GW U.S. finishing facility, intended to cut tariff-related import costs, unlock domestic tax incentives, and bring final processing of semi-finished solar cells back from Southeast Asia by late 2026. This move, alongside a tightening U.S. utility-scale solar market and shifting investor sentiment around energy security, is reshaping expectations for the company’s pricing power, margins, and reliance on policy support. headline: Geronimo Power Announces Start of Operations in Ohio at Dodson Creek Solar Project
summary: Geronimo Power (Geronimo) announced today the start of commercial operations at its Dodson Creek Solar Project (Dodson Creek) in Highland County, Ohio. Located within the PJM market, Dodson will deliver 117 megawatts (MW) of power and generate an estimated $49 million in direct economic benefit for the local community.
